phrases.intent_en: Ask if entry to the basilica is free
phrases.text_local: L'entrée de la basilique est gratuite ?
phrases.pronunciation: lahn-TRAY duh lah bah-zee-LEEK eh grah-TWEET
phrases.cultural_note: Entry to the basilica is free. Only the dome climb has a fee (around 7 euros). The dome offers one of the best 360-degree views of Paris.

responses.english: Yes, entry to the basilica is free.
responses.phonetic: wee, lan-TRAY duh lah bah-zee-LEEK eh grah-TWEET
responses.local: Oui, l'entrée de la basilique est gratuite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to access the dome
phrases.cultural_note: The dome access is via 300 narrow spiral steps — no elevator. The entrance is outside the basilica on the left side. Less crowded than the Eiffel Tower with equally stunning views.

responses.english: The dome entrance is outside, on the left side.
responses.phonetic: lan-TRAY doo dohm eh tah lex-tay-RYUHR, soor luh koh-TAY gohsh
responses.local: L'entrée du dôme est à l'extérieur, sur le côté gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Montmartre artists nearby
phrases.text_local: Où est la Place du Tertre avec les artistes ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah PLAHS doo TEHR-truh ah-VEK layz ar-TEEST
phrases.cultural_note: Place du Tertre is just behind the basilica. Artists have painted here since Picasso's day. Agree on a price before sitting for a portrait — it's not cheap.

responses.english: Place du Tertre is right behind the basilica.
responses.phonetic: lah plass doo TEHR-truh eh zhoost deh-RYEHR lah bah-zee-LEEK
responses.local: La Place du Tertre est juste derrière la basilique.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn puh PRAHNDR day FOH-toh ah lahn-tay-RYUHR
phrases.cultural_note: Photography is not allowed inside the basilica out of respect for worshippers. You can take photos from the parvis (terrace) outside with its stunning view.

responses.english: No, photos are not allowed inside.
responses.phonetic: nohn, lay foh-TOH nuh sohn pahz oh-toh-ree-ZAY ah lan-tay-RYUHR
responses.local: Non, les photos ne sont pas autorisées à l'intérieur.

phrases.text_local: Où est le funiculaire pour monter ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh foo-nee-koo-LEHR poor mohn-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Montmartre funicular runs with a regular metro ticket and saves you the 222-step climb. The station is at the base of the hill on Rue Foyatier.

responses.english: The funicular is at the bottom of the hill, on Rue Foyatier.
responses.phonetic: luh foo-nee-koo-LEHR eh tahn bah duh lah koh-LEEN, soor lah roo fwah-yah-TYAY
responses.local: Le funiculaire est en bas de la colline, sur la Rue Foyatier.
